prompt: A lookbook spread page (16:9) for the Spring/Summer 2026 collection of the high-fashion brand "MONA BANANA". Left page (left 1/2): A full-body shot of a character sitting on the veranda of an old Japanese house, gazing into the distance. Natural light only, stylish editorial photography style. Photorealistic quality, film camera texture. Right page (right 1/2): The following text on a white background (thin serif font, English): 'LOOK 03 SS2026 Collection "Between Worlds" Qipao in crimson silk with hand-embroidered peonies. Hand-placed frog buttons in 18k gold plating. Tasseled sash belt. Styled by M. Banana' At the bottom: 'MONA BANANA ─ https://t.co/1sj0qOokTG'. Overall style should resemble the 'intellectual and artistic fashion magazine spread' seen in Marni, Sacai, and Comme des Garçons lookbooks. A finish indistinguishable from a real high-end brand lookbook.
